runnability.evidence: Clear README with prerequisites, how to run, and file structure. All scripts executable with single command.

depth_of_mujoco_use.evidence: Position actuators (kp=4500/3500/2000), touch sensors (4x), contact forces, Jacobian IK, minimum-jerk trajectories.

task_design.evidence: Dual-arm space module assembly with 3 modules, 50mm random perturbation, fault recovery.

control.evidence: Closed-loop force control with real-time touch sensor feedback, fault detection and recovery, UAHP protocol.

engineering_quality.evidence: Modular architecture (controller, benchmark, renderer), 1500+ lines of well-structured code, comprehensive docs.

presentation.evidence: 1080p demo video with HUD showing force readings and progress, 25 seconds duration.

innovation.evidence: UAHP (Uncertainty-Aware Handover Protocol) for dual-arm coordination with real-time uncertainty estimation.
innovation.verification: Novel approach not seen in other submissions
